signals.raw:
Interactive Brokers Launches SOL Trading for Europeans | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Interactive Brokers launched SOL trading for European investors via Zero Hash this month, expanding access on one of the world's largest brokerage platforms; SOL at $82.08 with 167M network users and Symbiosis enabling any-to-any swaps via Raydium.[1]
